_note: SYNTHETIC recorded-shape Open Legislation response for statute-capture unit tests. The `text` is PLACEHOLDER content, NOT NY statute text — it exists only to exercise the NEW-mode formatter/validator and must never be promoted to golden. It carries LITERAL escaped newlines (two-char \n after json.loads) and a leading NBSP, mirroring the confirmed live API quirk (see tests/fixtures/openleg_raw_stf-179-g.json).

result.text:
§ 24. Placeholder public holidays. The following shall be
